text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Come on. We're gonna have an all-out battle! Me and you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ………………Heh heh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right then. Shall we? 
——My cute little Pokke.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Orrraaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
——Hell yeah!! 
Huff… huff… Whaddya think, Fuji-san!? Nice run, right!?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha… Very, very nice. 
Watching you tear it down the homestretch never fails to make 
my heart dance.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Woah… For real!? Hehehe, that's a huge honor, comin' from you! Come to think of it, I get real pumped whenever I know you're watchin' me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hold. On. Pokke? I noticed, just before the fourth corner, your 
timing was a little unsteady. I bet you got carried away in the 
middle and rushed yourself, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thinking "Is this too early to start my spurt? Aw man, I might 
not have the stamina for that… Nah, I've got the guts to pull 
through! Hoo-rah!" …Or something along those lines.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
…Holy crap, Fuji-san. That's, like, almost word for word what 
I was thinkin'! Dammit, you're right! If I didn't screw up like 
that, I coulda done way better, too…!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Lemme go again! Gimme another chance, Fuji-san! 
I'm gonna do it perfectly this time, just you watch! 
——Graaaaaah!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Stoooop, Pokke. Sorry. I wish I could stick around and watch, I really do… But I've got a meeting for the Fan Fest soon.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Aw geez, I forgot! Sorry about that. 
Y'know, this year's spring fest actually looks like it'll be 
a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
They're changing it up this time and splitting the whole school 
into red and white teams, yeah? I'm seeing a whole buncha 
people getting hyped up to go all out against each other.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
And you got nominated to be the white team's captain, right?! 
Heh. Any team we're on together's gonna be the toughest 
team out there, no contest!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
……Hang on, Pokke. Are you sure you read the team 
assignments?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: I'm on the RED teaaaaaam!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
No way… I just kinda figured I'd be on Fuji-san's 
team no matter what…!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Well, them's the breaks. No use crying about it. 
I'm countin' on you, my red team buddy Pokke ♪

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure… Actually, what'd you call me outta nowhere for, 
Tap? Need something from me or what?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, almost forgot. 
…See, you've got the most charisma outta the folks on 
the red team. So I got a little favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Pretty soon, the red team's gonna meet up to pick a captain, 
and decide what events we're gonna compete in, yeah? 
So at that meeting——

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna nominate myself for the "tug-of-war", "war games" 
and "2000 meter race". And I want you to back me up.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
See, Digital's gonna be competing in all three of 'em, apparently. 
…And if she is, then I hafta be there too!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Digital…? Agnes Digital, your gen-mate, right? Whaddya mean, you have to be there?

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: Heh! ——All part of getting my next big score!!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
That Agnes Digital…! She popped up everywhere, on dirt, 
on turf… And just when I thought her record couldn't get 
any crazier——

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Even at the Mile Championship, where all the monsters of the 
senior class gathered… With all the odds against her, she 
pulled off a crazy upset and WON!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Then she did it again on dirt, and overseas, too! No matter 
where she was, she'd pop up outta nowhere and win, win, win! 
She deserves to be called the "Hero of Every Battlefield"!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Even the Centurial Overlord T.M. Opera O wasn't enough 
to stop her. Hell, she beat you to the punch in beating the 
Overlord, Pokke!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: So, it all comes down to one thing——

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: The honor of being the one to take that Hero out is the biggest treasure of our era.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ! …Now it makes sense. Tap, you——

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
You got it. I'm gonna beat Digital at the Fan Fast and 
make it big! The tides are gonna change… Everyone in this 
era's gonna know my name!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the same generation as her, and I still don't have a single 
big win to my name. But my boom's just getting started… 
And I'm gonna make her light the fuse!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: I want her to be that first spark. I need her to be.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Victory. Attention. Fame. She snatched it all up, and in a crazy 
way! …It's like she stole all my dreams for herself and made 
'em come true, just like that.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Gotta be honest, I admire her. 
I wanna have an all-out brawl with her—— 
And I wanna win it!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: (…The person… I admire…)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: (Just one look at her was enough to steal my heart.)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
(Her running could make the whole crowd's hearts stop. 
It was miraculous, like a sparkling jewel… 
It was the coolest running in the whole wide world.)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: (Seeing her gave me a burning feeling in my chest… I could feel my legs itching to run. As if I was telling myself… Me too. I'm gonna be just like her one day. Just you watch.)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
(…And that's exactly why… I wanna… 
I wanna go at her, full force!!)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
(I wanna catch the back I've been chasing 
all this time——!)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
…It's a deal, Tap. I'll nominate you for all the events you want. 
But it won't just be a nomination from any old chump——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: It's gonna be an order from your captain!

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: What!? Haha! Slow your roll there! You don't mean——!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I do mean! I'm gonna be the red team's captain! 
——And it's gonna be an all-out war! Me against Fuji-san!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
——Hmm? My goodness, she's as boisterous as ever. 
Still, I must say, this is turning out to be quite the 
interesting event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There is a phenomenon in particle physics in which high-energy 
collisions produce a boson said to be the key to all the mysteries 
of the universe—— otherwise known as the "God Particle".

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, what about you, and your collisions? 
Kehehe… Oh, what to do, what to do?!
